zh.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz是Edward Poyntz和Maude Deincourt的女兒，於1415年出生在英國。她於大約1425年與Thomas Barrett在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1465年6月5日在英國艾可艾維勒享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz was born in 1415, in England as the daughter of Edward Poyntz and Maude Deincourt. She married Thomas Barrett about 1425, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 5 June 1465, in Aveley, Essex, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz est née en 1415, à Angleterre, fille d’Edward Poyntz et Maude Deincourt. Elle a épousé Thomas Barrett environ 1425, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1465, à Aveley, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz wurde 1415 in England, als Tochter von Edward Poyntz und Maude Deincourt geboren. Sie hat um 1425 in Essex, England Thomas Barrett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Juni 1465 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Aveley, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz è nata il nel 1415 nel England come figlia di Edward Poyntz e Maude Deincourt. Lei sposato Thomas Barrett circa 1425, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 5 giugno 1465, nel Aveley, Essex, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntzは1415年にイギリスでEdward PoyntzとMaude Deincourtの娘として生まれた。約1425年にイギリスエセックスでThomas Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1465年6月5日にイギリスエセックスエイベリーで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz(은)는 1415년 영국에서 Edward Poyntz(와)과 Maude Deincourt의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1425년 영국 에세스에서 Thomas Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 6월 5일 영국 에세스 에벨리에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom: Aveley, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz nasceu em 1415, em Inglaterra filha de Edward Poyntz e Maude Deincourt. Ela casou-se com Thomas Barrett aproximadamente 1425, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1465, em Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz родилась в 1415 г. в местности Англия. Её родителей звали Edward Poyntz и Maude Deincourt. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Barrett около 1425 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 5 июня 1465 г. в местности авели, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Maud Poyntz nació en 1415, en Inglaterra como hija de Edward Poyntz y Maude Deincourt. Se casó con Thomas Barrett aproximadamente 1425, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 5 de junio de 1465, en Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
